mapper.select: SELECT * FROM noteverso_note WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted}
mapper.update:
UPDATE noteverso_note
content_json = #{contentJson,typeHandler=com.noteverso.core.config.JsonbTypeHandler}::jsonb, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updater = #{updater},
project_id = #{projectId},
WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND creator = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
